creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Details!👇🏼

🌴Anna Maria Island has some beautiful beaches, but Bean Point Beach is my personal favorite! Bean point is located at the northern most tip of Anna Maria Island. There is beach access at North Shore Dr. and Gladiolus St. 

🚗Parking can be difficult since it’s only street parking, so get there early in the morning and be sure to park completely off the road or else you will get a parking ticket! 🎫 

🚩Heed warning flags that are posted on the beach and beware of rip currents here as they are very strong! You may also see some wildlife. Many report that 🦈 are very active here so keep that in mind before going in the water.
